title: Crevice Cleaning Brushes, Scrub Brush Tool for Hard to Reach Tight Spaces, Home Essentials Cleaning Supplies for Shower, Bathroom, Kitchen, Toilet，Window
features: Quality Materials: Crevice cleaning brushes are made from plastic and alloy materials, sturdy and long-lasting. The handle is made of non-slip materials, which is more comfortable to grip. The hard bristles resist deformation and falling off, and flexible use.

Ergonomic Design: The non-slip ergonomic handle provides a comfortable and labor-saving grip, protecting your hands during use. The soft, flexible silicone ear-hook complements the handle design, making it even easier to hold and work.

Efficient Cleaning: With a narrow head and front curved design, the brush can effortlessly access gaps, cracks, corners, and hard-to-reach areas. The thick and long bristles effectively remove dust, debris, and dirt from small spaces, delivering a thorough clean.

Convenient Size: This compact and portable brush is easily stored and transported, fits seamlessly into bags, drawers, or pockets, making it ideal for use at home, in the office, or while traveling and ensuring you're always ready for quick cleanups.

Easy Storage: The premium silicone ear-hanging feature not only serves as a convenient handle extension but also allows for easy hanging storage, keeping the brush within reach while saving counter or drawer space.

Multi-purpose Brush: Our silicone crevice brush is suitable for cleaning various surfaces such as sinks, window tracks, blinds, door tracks, faucets, cars, stoves, grout lines, basins, floors, keyboards, bathtubs, vents, drains, swimming pools, vehicles, furniture, boats, microwaves, coffee machines, shower door frames, fans, shoes, sneakers, ovens, washing machines, toilet tank floors, the seam between the toilet bottom and toilet lid, the gaps in carved furniture, outdoor brick seams, etc.
